{{Navbox |name = Earth's landforms |title = [[Earth]]'s [[landform]]s |bodyclass = hlist |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |above = [[Glossary of landforms|List of landforms]] |group1 = Mountainous |list1 = *[[Butte]] *[[Flat (landform)|Flat]] *[[Hill]] *[[Mountain]] **[[Mountain range|range]] *[[Plateau]] *[[Ridge]] *[[Tableland]] *[[Valley]] |group2 = Continental plain |list2 = *[[Ice sheet]] *[[Plain]] *[[Steppe]] *[[Tundra]] |group3 = [[Fluvial sediment processes|Fluvial]] |list3 = *[[Alluvial fan]] *[[Beach]] *[[Canyon]] *[[Cave]] *[[Channel (geography)|Channel]] *[[Cliff]] *[[Floodplain]] *[[Lake]] **[[Lake island|island]] *[[Levee]] *[[Meander]] *[[Oasis]] *[[Pond]] *[[Rapids]] *[[River]] **[[River delta|delta]] **[[River mouth|mouth]] *[[Strait]] *[[Swamp]] *[[Valley]] *[[Waterfall]] |group4 = [[Glacial landform|Glacial]] |list4 = *[[Arête]] *[[Cirque]] *[[Esker]] *[[Fjord]] *[[Glacier]] *[[Ice field]] *[[Tunnel valley]] |group5 = [[Coastal geography|Oceanic and
coastal landforms]] |list5 = *[[Atoll]] *[[Bay]] *[[Cape (geography)|Cape]] *[[Channel (geography)|Channel]] *[[Coast]] *[[Continental shelf]] *[[Coral reef]] *[[Estuary]] *[[Island]] *[[Isthmus]] *[[Lagoon]] *[[Mid-ocean ridge]] *[[Oceanic trench]] *[[Peninsula]] *[[Seamount]] *[[Volcanic island]] |group6 = Volcanic |list6 = *[[Caldera]] *[[Geyser]] *[[Guyot]] *[[Lava dome]] *[[Lava field]] *[[Submarine volcano]] *[[Volcanic crater]] *[[Volcanic crater lake]] *[[Volcanic dam]] *[[Volcanic island]] *[[Volcanic plateau]] *[[Volcanic plug]] *[[Volcano]] *[[Wall rock]] |group7 = [[Aeolian processes|Aeolian]] |list7 = *[[Desert]] *[[Dry lake]] *[[Dune]] *[[Sandhill]] *[[Tundra]] |group8 = Artificial |list8 = *[[Artificial island]] *[[Artificial reef]] *[[Bridge]] *[[Building]] *[[Canal]] *[[Dam]] *[[Ditch]] *[[Land reclamation]] *[[Levee]] *[[Polder]] *[[Quarry]] *[[Reservoir]] *[[Road]] *[[Tunnel]] |below = * {{See also|Geographical feature}} }} {{navbox documentation}} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Landform navigational boxes]] }} \n

coastal landforms]] |list5 = *[[:en:atoll|atoll]] *[[:en:Bay|Bay]] *[[:en:Cape (geography)|Cape]] *[[:en:Channel (geography)#Nautical channels|Channel]] *[[:en:Coast|Coast]] *[[:en:Continental shelf|Continental shelf]] *[[:en:Coral reef|Coral reef]] *[[:en:Estuary|Estuary]] *[[:en:Island|Island]] *[[:en:Isthmus|Isthmus]] *[[:en:Lagoon|Lagoon]] *[[Mid-ocean ridge]] *[[Oceanic trench]] *[[Peninsula]] *[[Seamount]] *[[Volcanic island]] |group6 = Volcanic |list6 = *[[:en:Caldera|Caldera]] *[[:en:Geyser|Geyser]] *[[:en:Guyot|Guyot]] *[[:en:Lava dome|Lava dome]] *[[:en:Lava field|Lava field]] *[[Submarine volcano]] *[[Volcanic crater]] *[[Volcanic crater lake]] *[[Volcanic dam]] *[[Volcanic island]] *[[Volcanic plateau]] *[[Volcanic plug]] *[[Volcano]] *[[Wall rock]] |group7 = [[:en:Aeolian processes|Aeolian]] |list7 = *[[:en:Desert|Desert]] *[[:en:Dry lake|Dry lake]] *[[:en:Dune|Dune]] *[[Sandhill]] *[[Tundra]] |group8 = Artificial |list8 = *[[:en:Artificial island|Artificial island]] *[[:en:Artificial reef|Artificial reef]] *[[:en:Bridge|Bridge]] *[[:en:Building|Building]] *[[:en:Canal|Canal]] *[[:en:Dam#Types|Dam#Types]] *[[:en:ditch|ditch]] *[[:en:Land reclamation|Land reclamation]] *[[:en:Levee|Levee]] *[[Polder]] *[[Quarry]] *[[Reservoir]] *[[Road]] *[[Tunnel]] |below = * {{See also|Geographical feature}} }} {{navbox documentation}} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Landform navigational boxes]] }} \n
